message:
🐛 Split image build into separate job on ubuntu-latest (#676)

The k8s-util self-hosted runner does not have Docker daemon available,
causing the docker buildx build step to fail with "Cannot connect to
the Docker daemon". Split the nightly image build into a separate job
that runs on ubuntu-latest (which has Docker), while the benchmark
job on k8s-util depends on it via `needs: build-image`.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,8 +20,25 @@ on:
     - cron: '0 0 * * *'
 
 jobs:
+  build-image:
+    name: Build Nightly Image
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Build and push nightly image
+        uses: ./.github/actions/docker-build-and-push
+        with:
+          tag: nightly
+          image-name: llm-d-benchmark
+          registry: ghcr.io/llm-d
+          github-token: ${{ secrets.GHCR_TOKEN }}
+
   run-benchmark-gke:
     name: CI - Nightly Benchmark on GKE
+    needs: build-image
     runs-on: [k8s-util]
     timeout-minutes: 240
 
@@ -37,14 +54,6 @@ jobs:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Build and push nightly image
-        uses: ./.github/actions/docker-build-and-push
-        with:
-          tag: nightly
-          image-name: llm-d-benchmark
-          registry: ghcr.io/llm-d
-          github-token: ${{ secrets.GHCR_TOKEN }}
-
       - name: Install Python 3.11
         uses: actions/setup-python@v6
         with:

@@ -20,14 +20,10 @@ on:
     - cron: '0 0 * * *'  # Daily at midnight UTC
 
 jobs:
-  run-benchmark:
-    name: Benchmark Test
-    runs-on: [k8s-util]
-    timeout-minutes: 240
-
-    env:
-      LLMDBENCH_IMAGE_TAG: nightly
-
+  build-image:
+    name: Build Nightly Image
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -40,6 +36,19 @@ jobs:
           registry: ghcr.io/llm-d
           github-token: ${{ secrets.GHCR_TOKEN }}
 
+  run-benchmark:
+    name: Benchmark Test
+    needs: build-image
+    runs-on: [k8s-util]
+    timeout-minutes: 240
+
+    env:
+      LLMDBENCH_IMAGE_TAG: nightly
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout code
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
       - uses: actions/setup-python@v6
         with:
           python-version: '3.11'
